title: Duvall Leads White House Meeting to Urge Prioritization of U.S. Crops for Renewable Fuel Tax Credits
content: American Farm Bureau President Zippy Duvall urged the administration to prioritize American-grown crops in the production of sustainable fuels during a meeting at the White House organized by the AFBF. Duvall was joined by leaders from the National Corn Growers Association and American Soybean Association to urge Senior Advisor to the President for Clean Energy Innovation John Podesta to take action.
author: Analysts Account
